items.h: HOFer Jake Roberts Bemoans Lack Of Characters In WWE And AEW
items.p: WWE HOFer Jake Roberts is underwhelmed with the characters in wrestling, across the board.

items.h: AEW's Jim Ross Gives Health Update After Hospital Release, Talks Upcoming Brain Surgery
items.p: AEW commentator Jim Ross opens up about his condition following his release from the hospital as well as his upcoming brain surgery.

items.h: Tony Khan Reflects On AEW World Title Stipulation Requested By Cody Rhodes, Adam Page
items.p: AEW President Tony Khan has confirmed that both Cody Rhodes and Adam Page requested the stipulation banning them from challenging for the company's world title.
